permissions.title: Location Permission Required
permissions.message: We need your location to show nearby farms and provide localized recommendations.
permissions.denied: Location permission denied. Please enable it in settings.

insights.title: BHOOMI Insights
insights.errorDescription: Check your connection and try again.
insights.emptyDescription: Insights will appear once farm data is loaded.

profile.title: Profile

faq.q1: How do I add a new farm?
faq.a1: Navigate to the Map screen and tap the '+' button to add a new farm location.
faq.q2: How accurate are the soil moisture readings?
faq.a2: Our readings are based on real-time sensor data with 95% accuracy.
faq.q3: Can I use the app offline?
faq.a3: Yes, the app caches recent data for offline viewing.
faq.q4: How do I change the language?
faq.a4: Go to Profile > Settings > Language and select your preferred language.

profile.logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to logout?

farmDetail.removeConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to remove this farm? All associated analytics and insights will be deleted.

predictions.heavyRain: Heavy rain expected soon ({{rainfall}}%). Pause scheduled irrigation.
predictions.heatStress: Extreme heat stress detected (UV {{uv}}). Increase soil moisture buffering.
predictions.highHumidity: Rising humidity increases fungal infection risk. Monitor crops closely.
predictions.weatherStable: General weather is {{condition}}. Conditions remain stable.
predictions.globalStable: AI predicts stable overall conditions across all farms. Minor temperature drop expected.
predictions.lowMoisture: Irrigation strongly recommended within next 6 hours to prevent yield loss.
predictions.heatWarning: Crop stress probability increased by 18% for {{cropType}} due to sustained heat.
predictions.diseaseRisk: Possible fungal risk detected due to recent humidity spike. Inspect lower leaves.
predictions.optimal: Optimal conditions for {{cropType}}. No immediate interventions required.

recommendations.delayFertilizer: Delay fertilizer application due to upcoming rain
recommendations.ensureDrainage: Ensure proper drainage in low-lying areas
recommendations.applyMulch: Apply mulching to retain soil moisture in high heat
recommendations.morningIrrigation: Irrigate during early morning or late evening
recommendations.monitorFungal: Monitor for fungal diseases due to high humidity
recommendations.haltIrrigation: Soil is waterlogged. Halt irrigation schedules

insights.excellent: Healthy moisture and weather conditions detected.
insights.critical: Critical conditions detected. Immediate intervention required to prevent yield loss.
insights.moderate: Moderate risk factors present. Monitor moisture levels and upcoming weather closely.
insights.heatStress: Heat stress slightly reducing crop stability.
insights.stable: Conditions are stable. Continue standard irrigation and monitoring protocols.
insights.rainfall: Recent rainfall is improving soil retention and stability.

details.criticalMoisture: Soil moisture and health metrics have plummeted to critical thresholds.
details.pestActive: High probability of active pest infestation or fungal disease spreading rapidly.
details.metricsDeviated: Certain environmental metrics have deviated from optimal growth ranges.
details.heatEvaporation: Sustained high temperatures are accelerating soil evaporation and stressing plants.
details.earlyDisease: Early signs of crop stress or mild disease symptoms are visible.
details.metricsBaseline: All major metrics are currently within acceptable baseline ranges.
details.precipitationSupplementing: Natural precipitation is actively supplementing soil moisture efficiently.
details.peakEfficiency: The agricultural ecosystem is performing at peak efficiency.
details.perfectlyAligned: Moisture, temperature, and soil health are perfectly aligned.

recs.emergencyIrrigation: Initiate emergency irrigation if moisture is severely low.
recs.pestControl: Apply immediate targeted pest control or systemic fungicide.
recs.increaseScouting: Increase frequency of crop health scouting and sensor monitoring.
recs.heatShielding: Prepare heat shielding or apply mulching to retain soil moisture.
recs.monitorFungal: Monitor closely for fungal growth and apply nutrient balancing.
recs.reduceIrrigation: Reduce artificial irrigation volume due to recent rainfall.
recs.continueOptimal: Continue optimal care protocols. No interventions needed.
